Episodes.Title: The Proposal Proposal
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Amy has trouble deciding whether or not she should marry Sheldon. Meanwhile, Bernadette confides in Penny when she finds out some huge news.

Episodes.Title: The Retraction Reaction
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard angers the University and the Physics Community when he gives an embarrassing radio interview. Bernadette and Amy compare their successes at work.

Episodes.Title: The Relaxation Integration
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Maria Ferrari
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Amy struggle with picking a wedding date. Meanwhile, Stuart and Raj fight over one of Bernadette's co-workers for a date.

Episodes.Title: The Explosion Implosion
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steven Molaro
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Howard and Bernadette are disappointed when they find out the sex of the baby. Leonard is annoyed when his mother befriends Penny.

Episodes.Title: The Collaboration Contamination
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Amy and Howard work in the lab together causing Sheldon, Bernadette and Raj to feel jealous and lonely. Penny starts using a parenting book to control Sheldon's behavior.

Episodes.Title: The Proton Regeneration
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Wil Wheaton both go head-to-head for the role of the new Professor Proton, Meanwhile Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are on bed rest.

Episodes.Title: The Geology Methodology
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: When Bert asks Sheldon to collaborate on a project with him, Sheldon becomes worried about others finding out because he thinks geology is beneath him. Raj seeks advice after reconnecting with Ruchi.

Episodes.Title: The Tesla Recoil
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Howard and Leonard become upset after they discover that Sheldon has been working with the military without telling them; Bernadette asks Raj to investigate her suspicions that Ruchi is attempting to take her job away from her.

Episodes.Title: The Bitcoin Entanglement
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon tries to teach the other guys a lesson after they cut him out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment seven years ago.

Episodes.Title: The Confidence Erosion
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from wedding planning by applying math to the process. Raj and Howard come to blows when Raj begins to feel like Howard hurts his confidence.

Episodes.Title: The Celebration Reverberation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Raj and Howard's feud continues as the gang plan Halley's first birthday party. Sheldon's surprise for Amy's birthday goes awry when they get food poisoning.

Episodes.Title: The Matrimonial Metric
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Amy pick their best-man and maid of honor by experimenting on the gang. Meanwhile, Leonard's self-confidence is still badly damaged after reading his brother's Christmas letter.

Episodes.Title: The Solo Oscillation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon kicks Amy out of the apartment to work solo, and she and Leonard end up bonding during a series of science experiments; Howard is replaced by Bert in Footprints on the Moon.

Episodes.Title: The Separation Triangulation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steven Molaro
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Raj meets a girl at the Planetarium, but soon after finds out she is married. Sheldon rents out his old room to use for his work.

Episodes.Title: The Novelization Correlation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Eric Kaplan
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard's book raises questions, and Amy guest stars on the new Professor Proton show.

Episodes.Title: The Neonatal Nomenclature
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: When Bernadette won't go into labor, the gang try different tactics to get things started. Also, Wolowitz confronts Bernadette after Amy accidentally reveals she's already chosen their son's name.

Episodes.Title: The Athenaeum Allocation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy. Also, Bernadette and Wolowitz have a hard time deciding who should stay at home with the kids and who should go back to work.

Episodes.Title: The Gates Excitation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard, Howard and Raj try to meet Bill Gates, who's meeting with Penny to merge their companies; Sheldon thinks he's the victim of an April Fool's prank.

Episodes.Title: The Tenant Disassociation
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Leonard runs against Sheldon to be president of the tenants association; Wolowitz and Koothrappali find a drone in the backyard.

Episodes.Title: The Reclusive Potential
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon takes the guys to a cabin in the middle of nowhere to meet a reclusive scientist; Penny and Bernadette improvise Amy's bachelorette party.

Episodes.Title: The Comet Polarization
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Maria Ferrari
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon's comic book store experience changes when writer Neil Gaiman puts Stuart's store on the map; friendships are threatened when Koothrappali takes credit for Penny's astronomical discovery.

Episodes.Title: The Monetary Insufficiency
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon goes to Vegas to win money for science. Also, Penny and Bernadette take Amy wedding dress shopping, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies.

Episodes.Title: The Sibling Realignment
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, David Goetsch
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: Sheldon and Leonard make a road trip to wrangle a reluctant wedding guest.

Episodes.Title: The Bow Tie Asymmetry
Episodes.Writer: Chuck Lorre, Bill Prady, Steve Holland
Episodes.Actors: Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco
Episodes.Plot: When Amy's parents and Sheldon's family arrive, everybody is focused to make sure all wedding arrangements go according to plan - everyone except the bride and groom.
